channel.title: dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the dead-code-hunter codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.description: Directory listing for src/__tests__/ in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 files and 0 subdirectories.

item.title: AnalysisEngine Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Handles the filtration and processing of dead code candidates identified by the static analysis SDK. Architectural overview of the AnalysisEngine domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The primary entry point and orchestration layer for the GitHub Action runtime environment. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.

item.title: SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: External service interface for the core static analysis and call-graph generation. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: TestHarness Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Testing infrastructure for validating analysis logic and integration with Vitest. Architectural overview of the TestHarness domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.
